dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8955 IH: Bipartisan Transparency for American Taxpayers Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fitzpatrick (for himself and Mr. Suozzi) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To prohibit the use of Federal funds for the payment of claims submitted to the Anti-Weaponization Fund.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Bipartisan Transparency for American Taxpayers Act.

section.header: Prohibition on use of Federal funds for payment of claims submitted to Anti-Weaponization Fund
section.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no Federal funds, including funds appropriated under section 1304 of title 31, United States Code, may be used for the payment of any claim submitted to the Anti-Weaponization Fund, established by the Department of Justice on May 18, 2026.
